title: VG project-level deploy STATE.json (v1)
description: Validates `.vg/deploy/STATE.json` written by /vg:deploy. v3.0.0 Stage 6 (deploy decouple): deploy state moved from per-phase `.vg/phases/{N}/DEPLOY-STATE.json` to project-level. Phase context preserved as audit-only field on each env entry.

schema_version.description: Pinned to 1 for v3.0.0. Bump on breaking shape changes.

envs.description: Per-environment current deploy state. Key = env name (e.g., 'fly.io', 'staging', 'prod', 'sandbox').

preferred_env_for_phase.description: Map phase number -> env name preferred for that phase. Used by /vg:scope env-preference Step 1b. Replaces v2.x per-phase DEPLOY-STATE.preferred_env_for.

active_environments.description: Env names currently in active rotation. Used by /vg:test deploy step to enumerate targets without reading every envs.* entry.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last STATE.json mutation. Atomic writers MUST refresh.

sha.description: Full git SHA (40 hex) of the commit deployed to this env.

phase_context.description: Phase number active when this deploy ran. Audit-only field — runtime gates do NOT branch on this. Replaces v2.x per-phase scoping.

previous_sha.description: SHA that was deployed to this env before the current one. Used as default rollback target by `/vg:deploy --rollback`.

rollback_target.description: Explicit override of previous_sha for rollback. Set when previous_sha was a known-bad version (e.g., the deploy being rolled forward from).

deploy_duration_sec.description: Seconds elapsed end-to-end for the deploy.

deploy_commands.description: Shell command lines executed for this deploy (audit log).

deployer.description: git user.email or service identity that ran the deploy.

release_tag.description: Optional release tag (e.g., 'v2.81.0') if the deploy was tagged.
